subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath testified that there is no God but Him, and that He, verily, is the One Who hath manifested Himself unto all things through His names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد القلم الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو و انه لهو الذی تجلی علی الاشیاء باسمائه
subcodes.subjects: @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
